recommended: Use Codex CLI with user subscription

forbidden: Direct OpenAI API substitution inside $vibe-planning except test fixtures and non-live mocks.
rules: Select ChatGPT Pro and the highest visible thinking-effort control; record Heavy only if it is the observed highest label, otherwise record the actual highest ordered effort option in evidence.
Use ChatGPT Pro / latest Pro model through Oracle browser automation for formal first plan and synthesis.
Put task, success criteria, and output shape up front; use clear delimiters around source context.
Ask for implementation-ready output and explicit assumptions; do not ask for hidden chain of thought.
Use iterative refinement: compare, revise, and preserve deltas rather than treating first output as final.
chatgpt_pro_browser.source: OpenAI ChatGPT help and prompt engineering best practices

forbidden: Anthropic API substitution for live $vibe-planning reviewer calls.
rules: Use Claude Opus 4.7 with max effort where the Claude Code surface exposes effort; otherwise include ultrathink and enable alwaysThinkingEnabled where available.
Use Claude Code CLI/subscription path, not Anthropic API, for live $vibe-planning reviewer calls.
Define success criteria and eval rubric before asking Claude to review or improve a plan.
Use XML-style or clearly delimited sections for context, task, constraints, and output schema.
claude_code.source: Anthropic Claude Code and Claude prompting best practices

forbidden: Undocumented search:true or web_search:true API parameters unless current official docs verify them.
Storing raw reasoning_content in user-facing artifacts.
rules: Set thinking.type=enabled and reasoning_effort=max; preserve reasoning_content only transiently for required tool-call replay and persist at most a hash.
Use official DeepSeek API base_url https://api.deepseek.com and model deepseek-v4-pro.
Set thinking.type=enabled and reasoning_effort=max for this reviewer.
Provide APR web-search as a tool call and require citations for search-derived claims.
Preserve DeepSeek reasoning_content only transiently when required for tool-call replay; persist only hashes and use final answer content for Plan IR.
deepseek_v4_pro_api.source: DeepSeek API docs for models, thinking mode, reasoning_effort, tool calls, and Deep Code webSearchTool configuration.

forbidden: Gemini API substitution for live $vibe-planning reviewer calls.
rules: Select Deep Think; if a separate Gemini thinking-level control is exposed, set it to high.
Use concise direct instructions; place the decisive request after long context.
Request Deep Think through Oracle browser automation and verify same-session mode before prompt submission.
Control verbosity explicitly and ask for structured plan sections.
gemini_deep_think_browser.source: Google Gemini prompt design strategies and Gemini thinking guidance

rules: Use grok-4.3 with reasoning_effort=high for the single-model reasoning route; do not use xhigh for grok-4.3 because official xAI docs list high as its maximum.
Use xAI API for Grok routes; resolve current recommended reasoning model at runtime.
Prefer structured outputs where possible and set reasoning effort high for complex plan review.
Treat legacy Grok Heavy as a workflow alias, not a hard-coded model ID.
xai_grok_api.source: xAI Grok model, reasoning, and structured output docs
